---
title: "AI and ML Intro"
description: Introduction to AI and Machine Learning  
description-short: Introduction to AI and Machine Learning
duration: 30 mins

editor: { render-on-save: true }
---

## Slides

{{< revealjs "slides/slides-02-ai-ml-intro.html" height="600px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

## Outline

- What is AI? 
- What is ML? 
- Machine learning terminology
